creator: andrei@liga.mec.upt.ro
text:
Hi.

I have a FreeBSD server with 6.1 updated on IT. It's configured like a webserver - www.liga.mec.upt.ro . When I'm trying to acces a link, the name changes to ip (193.226.8.244). I have Joomla configured in the www. Any ideeas why it does that? In cannot find a viable solution ...
